items.example: I try to avoid junk food and eat more vegetables.
Fresh fruit and vegetables are full of vitamins.
You should get at least 30 minutes of exercise every day.
I go jogging in the park every morning before work.
I go to the gym three times a week.
A balanced diet is important for good health.
Swimming is a great way to keep fit.
She wants to lose weight before the summer holidays.
My personal trainer helps me plan my workouts.
I work out at the gym every evening.
Don't forget to do some stretching after your run.
I feel more energetic when I exercise regularly.
